## File upload

### How to read in your data

*ETVApp* supports text files with different extensions (.exp, .csv, and .txt) 
and vendor specific formats. Find more details in the help of `import_data()`.

After selecting the workflow you intend to use, click on `Upload files` in the
header and select the `Upload files` tab. ***ETVApp*** will guide you through 
the workflow by uploading only the file set required for the next step.

***Note!*** You can access the test data provided for the workflows by clicking
`Testdata` in the header and selecting the `Testdata files` tab.
